title: Tris-HCl Buffer Preparation
author: Neilier Junior
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfyhjpt6

steps.instruction: pH range: pH 7.2 to pH 9.0 (a) 0.1 M Tris(hydroxymethyl)aminomethane; 12.1 g L -1 (M.W.: 121.0 g mol -1 ) (b) 0.1 M Hydrochloric acid Mix 50 mL, Tris(hydroxymethyl)aminomethane and indicated volume of hydrochloric acid. %s %s

substeps.instruction: M Hydrochloric acid Mix 50 mL, Tris(hydroxymethyl)aminomethane and indicated volume of hydrochloric acid. %s %s

steps.instruction: Adjust the final volume to 200 mL with deionized water.
Adjust the final pH using a sensitive pH meter.
